---
title: "experimenting"
author: "Olivia Aguiar"
date: "2026-06-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#declare an array with 24 zeroes
X <- array(0, dim = c(24))
#populate array with random numbers between 1 and 100
X <- sample(1:100, 24, replace = TRUE)
#indexed starting at 1 in R not starting at 0
#[1] is S(0,m,a)
#[2] is S(0,m,h)
#[3] is S(1,m,a)
#[4] is S(1,m,h)
#[5] is S(2,m,a)
#[6] is S(2,m,h)
#[7] is I(0,m,h)
#[8] is I(0,m,a)
#[9] is I(1,m,h)
#[10] is I(1,m,a)
#[11] is I(2,m,h)
#[12] is I(2,m,a)
#[13] is S(0,f,a)
#[14] is S(0,f,h)
#[15] is S(1,f,a)
#[16] is S(1,f,h)
#[17] is S(2,f,a)
#[18] is S(2,f,h)
#[19] is I(0,f,h)
#[20] is I(0,f,a)
#[21] is I(1,f,h)
#[22] is I(1,f,a)
#[23] is I(2,f,h)
#[24] is I(2,f,a)
```
